title: Peaceful nightmare
description: This modpack transforms the traditional survival experience into a peaceful journey with unsettling horror elements. It offers a complete progression system, ensuring you can play through the full game in a unique and immersive way.
body: This modpack reimagines the standard survival mode by turning it into a peaceful world,but filled with unsettling horror elements that keep you on edge.If you are looking for a new way to play Minecraft — one that removes repetitive combat but introduces psychological horror and suspense — this pack is designed for you.
